name: Scheduled Content Audit
description: Runs a scheduled fidelity check across a set of profiles, generates a digest of quality signals, and routes findings through a review gate before notifying the content team.
assumptions: Profile IDs are stable and belong to the tenant.
The fidelity threshold is calibrated to acceptable quality levels.
Reviewers are notified out-of-band (e.g. via the platform dashboard) that a review gate is waiting.

config.message: Content audit complete. Review findings in the platform dashboard.

parameters.name: cronExpression
parameters.description: Cron expression for the audit schedule (e.g. '0 0 1 * *' for monthly).

parameters.name: timezone
parameters.description: IANA timezone for the cron schedule.

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: Profile ID used to generate the audit digest.

parameters.name: minFidelityScore
parameters.description: Minimum acceptable fidelity score (0–1). Profiles below this threshold are flagged.

parameters.name: digestPrompt
parameters.default: Produce a concise audit digest identifying profiles that fall below the fidelity threshold, the likely causes, and recommended remediation steps.
parameters.description: Prompt used to generate the audit digest.

parameters.name: notificationChannel
parameters.description: Notification channel: email, slack, or webhook.
